summary: Iteration 66: Tested all Bulgarian TemaDom platform features from Phase 3 user requests. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Landing page with correct nav, /companies page PUBLIC with 3 tabs, /register page with beta notice, /feedback page PUBLIC with 2 tabs. All fake data confirmed removed - stats show 0 companies, 0 masters.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/feedback - returns feedback list with avg_rating and total
✅ POST /api/feedback - creates feedback with rating successfully
✅ GET /api/suggestions - returns suggestions list sorted by votes
✅ GET /api/companies - returns companies list (empty after cleanup)
✅ Navbar shows 'Фирми и Майстори' link (not separate Фирми/Майстори)
✅ Dropdown menu (Още) does NOT contain duplicate 'Фирми' entry
✅ /companies page has 3 tabs: Всички, Фирми, Майстори
✅ /companies shows empty state after DB cleanup (0 professionals)
✅ /register page shows beta notice 'Платформата е нова!'
✅ /register beta notice has blue info box styling
✅ /register beta notice contains link to /feedback page
✅ Feedback form has star rating (1-5), name input, comment textarea
✅ Suggestions form has name input, suggestion textarea
✅ Suggestions list shows upvote button with vote count
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 3 user-requested features implemented correctly:
1. ✅ Duplicate 'Фирми' removed from dropdown - now uses 'Фирми и Майстори'
2. ✅ Companies and Masters pages merged into /companies with 3 filter tabs
3. ✅ All fake firms/profiles removed from DB (confirmed 0 companies, 0 masters)
4. ✅ Beta notice added to /register page with blue styling
5. ✅ Suggestions/feedback section at /feedback with public access
6. ✅ /companies and /feedback pages are now PUBLIC (no login required)

test_credentials.note: No credentials needed - all tested features are PUBLIC

seed_data_creation: None - Verified empty DB state after cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 verified all Phase 3 user requests. Database has been cleaned of fake data - only 1 real user (Petko) remains. /companies and /feedback pages are PUBLIC. Navbar uses 'Фирми и Майстори' (merged). Register page has beta notice. Suggestions API endpoints (/api/suggestions) work correctly with POST, GET, and VOTE functionality.

verified_features.dropdown_menu: No duplicate 'Фирми' - shows services, blog, community, etc.

register_page.styling: blue info box with Info icon
